craigslist.geocode_query: 7220 Central Ave SE, Albuquerque Unbelievable Value
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Cinnamon Tree Leasing Office: 7220 Central Ave SE Albuquerque, NM 87108 Call for details: show contact info Take a look at what Cinnamon Tree has to offer! Whether you're seeking a peaceful haven or vibrant city life, Cinnamon Tree Apartments is the perfect place to call home. Make one of our apartments in Albuquerque, NM, your next residence and enjoy spacious floor plans with practical amenities, beautiful community grounds, and a location thats close to anything you might want and need. The vibrancy of Albuquerque, NM, and our apartments for rent create an unparalleled living experience. If inside each one of our homes you can find exceptional amenities and stylish designs, outside of them youll discover a vibrant neighborhood that enriches every part of your daily life. Surrounded by a lush setting, Cinnamon Tree is the perfect place to enjoy the serenity of nature and engage in outdoor activities. We provide a sparkling swimming pool thats perfect for afternoon relaxation, as well as a covered picnic area so you can savor a hearty meal in the shade of a grand pavilion. You and the little ones will spend quality time together at the playground and on the basketball court. And even better than that, youll have access to a state-of-the-art fitness center and an inviting clubhouseboth coming soon. Other community perks are the laundry facilities, carports, dog park, and our maintenance teams reliable support. Reach out to our team and allow them to assist you in discovering your ideal two-bedroom, studio, or loft apartment in Albuquerque, NM! Rental Information: 2 Bedroom / 1 Bathroom / 614 sq ft Monthly Price: $1050 *Optional and usage-based charges not included. Contact office to confirm pricing details and included fees. Lease Terms: 6-Month, 7-Month, 8-Month, 9-Month, 10-Month, 11-Month, 12-Month, 13-Month, 14-Month Apartment Amenities: Additional Information: ✓ Basketball Court ✓ Clubhouse ✓ Controlled Access ✓ Fitness Center ✓ Laundry Service ✓ Lounge ✓ Maintenance on site ✓ Playground ✓ Property Manager on Site ✓ Sundeck Leasing Hours: Mon - Thu: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM Fri: 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM Sat: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM Call for details: show contact info Pet Policy: Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/cinnamontreeapts/ Website: www.apts-rental.com?n=cinnamon_tree&rp=feAayBL8JDtc&t=wb Online Application: www.apts-rental.com?n=cinnamon_tree&rp=feAayBL8JDtc&t=ap 3D Virtual Tour: www.apts-rental.com?n=cinnamon_tree&rp=feAayBL8JDtc&t=trt Schedule a Tour: www.apts-rental.com?n=cinnamon_tree&rp=feAayBL8JDtc&t=sch All pricing, availability, fees, and terms are subject to change without notice.
